naming_convention.hero.jpg: Primary profile image — used as the main restaurant card photo. Should show the restaurant's best angle (storefront or signature interior shot).
naming_convention.food_01.jpg ... food_03.jpg: Dish photography — up to 3 photos of signature dishes. Used in gallery carousels and menu previews.
naming_convention.interior_01.jpg, interior_02.jpg: Interior/dining room shots — atmosphere, decor, seating. Used for 'ambiance' section of restaurant profile.
naming_convention.exterior_01.jpg: Storefront/façade — shows the entrance, signage, terrace if applicable.
naming_convention.menu_photo_01.jpg: Physical menu card — photo of the actual menú del día board or printed menu.
naming_convention.ambiance_01.jpg: Atmosphere/vibe shot — captures the feel (lighting, crowd, energy). For 'vibe' tags in app.
naming_convention.team_01.jpg: Chef/staff photo — personal touch for the profile. Optional but adds trust.
